mapper.update: UPDATE pw_campaign SET campaign_name = #{campaignName}, campaign_desc = #{campaignDesc}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, total_stock = #{totalStock}, remaining_stock = #{remainingStock}, max_participations = #{maxParticipations}, policy_id = #{policyId}, status = #{status} WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pw_campaign ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM pw_campaign WHERE status = 5 AND start_time <= NOW() AND end_time >= NOW() AND remaining_stock > 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE pw_campaign SET status = #{status} WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId}
UPDATE pw_campaign SET remaining_stock = remaining_stock - 1 WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND remaining_stock > 0
UPDATE pw_campaign SET remaining_stock = remaining_stock + 1 WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId}
UPDATE pw_campaign SET remaining_stock = #{stock} WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pw_campaign WHERE status IN (4, 5, 6) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT remaining_stock FROM pw_campaign WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId}
